name: Shelly Excel Family Profile Processor - Production

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, familyProfile: $json, message: 'Family profile processed successfully', processingTime: '{{ $now.diff($('Excel Processor Webhook').first().json.timestamp).toFormat('ss') }}s' } }}
={{ { success: false, error: $json.message || 'Processing failed', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }}
